title: pleuridium triquetrum
intro: Pleuridium triquetrum, also known as the Three-angled Pleuridium, is a species of liverwort that belongs to the family Pallaviciniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and pneumonia, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pleuridium triquetrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe irritated mucous membranes, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Pleuridium triquetrum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
